prompt: Vertical editorial photograph of a chaotically overstuffed women's wardrobe. Far too many clothes crammed onto one rail, jammed so tightly they bulge, several garments slipping off hangers with sleeves and hems tangled, a couple of pieces fallen onto the floor below. Loud clashing variety of colours and prints all mixed with no order: red, cobalt blue, mustard, floral, gingham, candy stripe, polka dot, plaid, knits and dresses and blouses together. Bright natural daylight, vivid true-to-life saturated colour, busy and overwhelming, the feeling of 'a full closet and nothing to wear.' Candid realistic photography, rich fabric texture, no text, no logos, no faces.
